title: Multiplex PCR-SSP for SNP Analysis
author: Gabriela GCK Canalli Kretzschmar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p5sdq6e

steps.instruction: The amounts described in this protocol are for one sample. Multiply them for the number of samples to be investigated. Remember: Each sample shall be tested in all four mix reactions 1, 2, 3 and 4 (4 tubes). Always make plus 10% mix. This means that each sample shall be distributed in 4 microtubes (for 4 reactions). Label properly the microtubes for the mixes, identifying them: MIX 1 (in21-rs3849266_C/ ex22-rs2274567_A; in37-rs4844610_A / in37-rs12034383_G) MIX 2 (in21-rs3849266_C/ ex22-rs2274567_G; in37-rs4844610_A / in37-rs12034383_A) MIX 3 (in21-rs3849266_T/ ex22-rs2274567_A; in37-rs4844610_C / in37-rs12034383_G) MIX 4 (in21-rs3849266_T/ ex22-rs2274567_G; in37-rs4844610_C / in37-rs12034383_A) Keep these microtubes in ice. The sizes of the fragments are: in21-rs3849266 / ex22-rs2274567 = 667bp in37-rs4844610 / in37-rs12034383 = 1080bp
Add Ultrapure Water to the microtube of each mix Ultrapure Water Contributed by users undetermined, for sample
Add Coral Buffer to each mix. The Coral Buffer containing 1.5 mM of MgCl2 1x Coral Buffer Qiagen undetermined, for sample
Add 0.2 mM dNTP dNTP MIX (mM) 0.2 Contributed by users undetermined, for sample
Add 0.5 mM MgCl2 to each mix. (Total of MgCl2 is 2 mM to each mix). MgCl2 Contributed by users undetermined, for sample

Add control primer (forward and reverse) - HGH 0.064 µl for forward 0.064 µl for reverse 5’-3’ Sequence: HGH f TGCCTTCCCAACCATTCCCTTA HGH r CCACTCACGGATTTCTGTTGTGTTTC The fragment size is: 431bp HGH (Control Primer) - Forward and Reverse Contributed by users undetermined, (0.08 µM)

Add the specific primers: MIX 1 (in21-rs3849266_C/ ex22-rs2274567_A; in37-rs4844610_A / in37-rs12034383_G) MIX 2 (in21-rs3849266_C/ ex22-rs2274567_G; in37-rs4844610_A / in37-rs12034383_A) MIX 3 (in21-rs3849266_T/ ex22-rs2274567_A; in37-rs4844610_C / in37-rs12034383_G) MIX 4 (in21-rs3849266_T/ ex22-rs2274567_G; in37-rs4844610_C / in37-rs12034383_A) For in21/ex22 - add 0.144µl of each primer (F and R) for sample, (0.18 µM) For in37/in37 - add 0.32µl of each primer (F and R) for sample (0.4 µM) 5’-3’ Sequence - rs3849266 CTGATGGCTTGGGGTA T CTGATGGCTTGGGGTA C 5’-3’ Sequence - rs2274567 (reverse primer) CTCAATCTGCATTGATCCA C CTCAATCTGCATTGATCCA T 5’-3’ Sequence - rs4844610 CTACACAAAACAGCCTTGT A CTACACAAAACAGCCTTGT C 5’-3’ Sequence - rs12034383 (reverse primer) AGATGTCCATGCCTTAA C AGATGTCCATGCCTTAA T Specific Primers Forward and Reverse Contributed by users
Add an aliquot of DNA sample to each tube. Kepp the plate cold. DNA sample Contributed by users undetermined
Add the Taq DNA polymerase to the mix. Briefly vortex and centrifuge for some seconds. Taq DNA Polymerase Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher undetermined, for sample/ 0.3 Units/ul
Add an aliquot of the mix to each tube. Remember, each sample shall be tested in all four mix reactions 1, 2, 3 and 4 (4 tubes) The final volume for each sample is 8 µl. undetermined, for sample
Close well the tubes and centrifuge for some seconds Put in the thermocycler

Use: Thermal cycling begins with 94°C for 5 min and 20 s; followed by 35 cycles, where each cycle began with 94 °C for 20 s and ended with 72 °C for 40 s. The annealing temperatures were 63 °C for the initial 6 cycles, 61 °C for thefollowing 16 cycles, 59 ºC for the last 11 cycles.
